title: STAR WARS Battlefront II

notes:
On CachyOS - game worked perfectly (Platinum) under kernel 6.14 and Nvidia drivers 570. 
After recent update to kernel 6.15 and Nvidia drivers 575 it no longer launches, irrespective of what version of proton is used. Restoring system snapshot of old kernel and driver allows me to play, but this is not a viable long term solution. Hoping for Nvidia driver patch to fix this issue. Driver 575 has been known to break other games as well.
